headline: Stocks Are in Retreat After a Month of War. Here Are the Losers—And Winners
summary: The majority of stocks have fallen since the war in Iran erupted late last month, with mining, travel, and homebuilder stocks hit particularly hard by the combination of rising oil prices and interest rates.
